// src/pages/subscription/BasicContent.js import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { useSubscription } from '../../contexts/SubscriptionContext'; import TierContentManager from '../../components/subscription/TierContentManager'; import useTierContent from '../../hooks/useTierContent'; import { Activity, Award, BookOpen, Calendar } from 'lucide-react'; // Basic Tier Content Page const BasicContent = () => { const { formatTierName } = useSubscription(); const { getCurrentTierFeatures } = useTierContent(); // Get features for this tier const workouts = getCurrentTierFeatures('workouts'); const education = getCurrentTierFeatures('education'); return (

Basic Tier Content

Welcome to the {formatTierName('basic')} tier! Here you'll find all the content available to you.

{/* Basic Workouts Section */}

Beginner Workouts

{/* These would come from your API in a real app */} {[1, 2, 3, 4, 5].map((item) => (
Workout Image

Basic Workout #{item}

15 minutes • Beginner

))}
{/* Premium Tier Preview */}
{[1, 2, 3].map((item) => (
Premium Workout Preview

Premium Workout #{item}

20 minutes • Intermediate

))}
} >

Premium workouts content would go here

{/* Progress Tracking Section */}

Your Progress

Total Workouts

12

Current Streak

3 days

Weekly Goals

Complete 3 workouts 2/3
Exercise 5 days this week 3/5
{/* Premium Progress Preview */}

Advanced progress tracking would go here
{/* Education Section */}

Educational Resources

Getting Started

{education.features.map((feature, index) => (

{feature}

Learn the basics to get started safely with ElderFit.

Read More →
))}
{/* Premium Education Preview */}

Premium educational content would go here
{/* Calendar Section - Premium Preview */}

Workout Calendar

April 2025
{['S', 'M', 'T', 'W', 'T', 'F', 'S'].map((day, i) => (
{day}
))} {[...Array(30)].map((_, i) => (
{i + 1}
))}
} />
{/* Upgrade Section */}

Ready for more?

Upgrade to Premium or Elite to unlock additional workouts, advanced tracking, and more premium features.

View Premium Plans
); }; // Export Basic Content page export default BasicContent; // src/pages/subscription/PremiumContent.js would be similar but with premium features // src/pages/subscription/EliteContent.js would showcase elite-tier content
